title: Adopt the Phase-1 candidate schema set as working baseline and open ratification
description: The Phase-1 schema design exercise (DEVGUIDE §5.1) has produced a complete candidate schema for all five systems with 16 open questions. Decide whether to adopt it as the working baseline and open the OQs for community ratification, gating Phase 2 on the two blocking questions (OQ-01 notation, OQ-04 decay sync).
